global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a promotional card highlighting a special offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on fresh favorites for €19.99.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Promotional card
elements.description: A rectangular card with rounded corners, featuring a light purple color and a placeholder icon in the center.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Fresh favorites nearby,' providing more context to the offer.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is shown in a larger, bold white font, emphasizing the cost of the offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Get offer' encourages user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' is displayed at the top left corner in a smaller font, identifying the brand.
elements.text_content: 2-for-1 tonight Fresh favorites nearby €19.99 Get offer

elements.label: Placeholder icon
elements.description: A simple line icon is centered within the promotional card, serving as a decorative element.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, PlateSprint
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text, price, and a CTA button at the bottom.
